title: Case Classification and Selection Based on Regression Results
text: Classification choice cases case studies based regression results. now, package contains functions classification cases typical, deviant, extreme pathway cases choice types cases. stage, focus single cases case selection based linear regression models (class lm). package available CRAN. version CRAN Github 0.2.0. package can installed CRAN following command. package can installed Github following command. documentation package examples can found . Please open issue Github problems come . Work package funded European Research Council (ERC) European Union’s Horizon 2020 research innovation program (grant agreement number 638425, Enhanced Qualitative Multimethod Research).

title: Identification of the most deviant case — most_deviant
code: df <- lm(mpg ~ disp + wt, data = mtcars) most_deviant(df) #> Toyota Corolla  #>        6.34844

title: Pathway case — pathway
text: Calculation pathway values, defined difference residuals full model reduced model lacking pathway variable. larger difference, case qualifies pathway case suitable analysis mechanisms.

title: Pathway case — pathway
Pathway case — pathway
text: full_model Full model including covariate interest (= pathway variable) reduced_model Reduced model excluding covariate interest

title: Pathway case — pathway
text: dataframe - full model variables, - full model residuals (full_resid), - reduced model residuals (reduced_resid), - pathway values following Weller/Barnes (pathway_wb), - pathway values following Gerring (pathway_gvalue), - variable showing whether Gerring's criterion pathway case met (pathway_gstatus)

title: Pathway case — pathway
text: difference absolute residuals full reduced model follows approach developed Weller Barnes (2014): Finding Pathways: Mixed-Method Research Studying Causal Mechanisms. Cambridge: Cambridge University Press. doi:10.1017/CBO9781139644501 ). calculation absolute difference full-model reduced-model residuals, given case's reduced-model residual larger full-model residual, follows proposal Gerring (2007): (Viable) Crucial-Case Method? Comparative Political Studies 40 (3): 231-253. doi:10.1177/0010414006290784 )

title: Pathway case — pathway

title: Plot of residuals against pathway variable — pathway_xvr
Plot of residuals against pathway variable — pathway_xvr
text: full_model Full model including covariate interest (= pathway variable) reduced_model Reduced model excluding covariate interest pathway_type Type pathway values. pathway_wb pathway values proposed Weller Barnes. pathway_gvalue values calculated Gerring.

title: Plot of residuals against pathway variable — pathway_xvr
text: plot chosen type pathway values pathway variable created ggplot2.

title: Plot of residuals against pathway variable — pathway_xvr
code: df_full <- lm(mpg ~ disp + wt, data = mtcars) df_reduced <- lm(mpg ~ wt, data = mtcars) pathway_xvr(df_full, df_reduced, pathway_type = "pathway_wb") #> Warning: `aes_string()` was deprecated in ggplot2 3.0.0. #> ℹ Please use tidy evaluation idioms with `aes()`. #> ℹ See also `vignette("ggplot2-in-packages")` for more information. #> ℹ The deprecated feature was likely used in the MMRcaseselection package. #>   Please report the issue at #>   <https://github.com/ingorohlfing/MMRcaseselection/issues>.

what: Classification of cases as typical and deviant using a prediction interval. — predint
title: Classification of cases as typical and deviant using a prediction interval. — predint
text: Case designated typical (= well predicted) deviant (= badly predicted) based prediction interval. x% prediction interval represents range expect include x% outcome values repeated samples. example, 95% prediction interval ranging 0-5 conveys 95% future outcome values range 0-5. observed outcome inside prediction interval, case classified (designated)  typical deviant otherwise.

title: Classification of cases as typical and deviant using a prediction interval. — predint
Classification of cases as typical and deviant using a prediction interval. — predint
text: lmobject Object generated lm piwidth Width prediction interval (default 0.95).

title: Classification of cases as typical and deviant using a prediction interval. — predint
text: dataframe observed outcome, fitted outcome, upper lower bound % prediction interval classification cases typical deviant.

title: Classification of cases as typical and deviant using a prediction interval. — predint
text: Proposed Rohlfing, Ingo Peter Starke (2013): Building Solid Ground: Robust Case Selection Multi-Method Research. *Swiss Political Science Review* 19 (4): 492-512. (doi:10.1111/spsr.12052 )

title: Classification of cases as typical and deviant using a prediction interval. — predint

Plot of typical and deviant cases with prediction intervals — predint_plot
text: pred_df dataframe created predint.

title: Plot of typical and deviant cases with prediction intervals — predint_plot
text: plot observed outcome fitted outcome prediction intervals case classifications. Created ggplot2.

title: Plot of typical and deviant cases with prediction intervals — predint_plot
code: df <- lm(mpg ~ disp + wt, data = mtcars) predint_status <- predint(df, piwidth = 0.9) predint_plot(predint_status)

title: Classification of cases as typical and deviant using the standard deviation of the residuals. — residstd
text: Proposed Lieberman, Evan S. (2005): Nested Analysis Mixed-Method Strategy Comparative Research. American Political Science Review 99 (3): 435-452. doi:10.1017/S0003055405051762 .

title: Classification of cases as typical and deviant using the standard deviation of the residuals. — residstd
code: df <- lm(mpg ~ disp + wt, data = mtcars) residstd(df, stdshare = 1) #> Error in x$terms: object of type 'closure' is not subsettable
